title: Minimalism
description: A minimal modpack focused on performance and quality of life features.
body:
![Minimalism](https://gist.githubusercontent.com/notrohit1702/3588902d6c18abb0c73ed82ea1dbe992/raw/a41975b2840342467f23125b197eecaa28a990ee/Minimalism.svg)
![Seperator](https://i.imgur.com/DcWVd5R.png)

![Download Count](https://img.shields.io/modrinth/dt/gBNQ7xiT?style=for-the-badge&label=Downloads&labelColor=%230b1528&color=%23ffffff)
![Loader: Fabric](https://img.shields.io/badge/Loader-Fabric-ffffff?style=for-the-badge&labelColor=0b1528)
![Minecraft: 1.21.1](https://img.shields.io/badge/Minecraft-1.21.1-ffffff?style=for-the-badge&labelColor=0b1528)
![Side: Client](https://img.shields.io/badge/Side-Client-ffffff?style=for-the-badge&labelColor=0b1528)
[![Discord: notrohit](https://img.shields.io/badge/Discord-notrohit-ffffff?style=for-the-badge&labelColor=0b1528)](https://discord.com/users/827088316306030653)

### **✤ ABOUT**

![Seperator](https://i.imgur.com/DcWVd5R.png)

A modpack focused on improving performance, adding quality of life features and giving an easy way for OptiFine users to transition to Quilt.

### **✧ FEATURES**

![Seperator](https://i.imgur.com/DcWVd5R.png)

» OptiFine features, such as connected textures, custom item textures, custom skies, shaders etc.

» Improved FPS with mods such as sodium, lithium, starlight, very many players etc.

» Quality of life features such as zoom, an inbuilt screenshot viewer, perspective mod, emojis (type ":" in chat for a list of options), in-game resourcepack and shaderpack downloader etc.

» Made to play on servers - most features are client side and are allowed on most servers (**with the exception of perspective mod and freecam which are disallowed on hypixel and some other servers!**)

### **𑁍 TUTORIAL**

![Seperator](https://i.imgur.com/DcWVd5R.png)

<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/ijyWs_x6N3s" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

### **⚠️ DISCLAIMERS**

![Seperator](https://i.imgur.com/DcWVd5R.png)

Your first time loading the modpack will likely be much slower than how it is supposed to be. Do not worry, it just needs to generate caches and then it will launch faster from the next time.

If you use render distances below 4, custom sky resource packs might be glitchy and you may see triangles in the sky. Anything above or equal to 4 should be fine.

<FONT COLOR = "RED"> **WARNING:** </FONT> If you will be using this modpack on hypixel (or other servers where it's not allowed), make sure to remove Perspektive (in versions below 3.0), Freelook (in versions 3.0 and above) and Freecam (in versions 1.5 and above) from the mods folder!

### **©️ CREDITS**

![Seperator](https://i.imgur.com/DcWVd5R.png)

Credit to the mods and mod developers is always given in the [latest release of the modpack](https://modrinth.com/modpack/minimalism/version/latest).
